inputs.label: Observed Time (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: Average cycle time recorded during direct observation, excluding any abnormal delays.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cycle time recorded during direct observation, excluding any abnormal delays.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan gözlem sırasında kaydedilen, anormal gecikmeler hariç ortalama çevrim süresi.

inputs.label: Performance Rating (%)
inputs.businessContext: Operator pace relative to normal (100% = standard pace). Based on Westinghouse or similar rating system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Operator pace relative to normal (100% = standard pace). Based on Westinghouse or similar rating system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Operatör hızının normale göre oranı (%100 = standart hız). Westinghouse veya benzeri değerlendirme sistemine dayanır.

inputs.label: Allowance Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Total allowance for fatigue, personal needs, and unavoidable delays (ISO 9001 / ILO guidelines).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total allowance for fatigue, personal needs, and unavoidable delays (ISO 9001 / ILO guidelines).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yorgunluk, kişisel ihtiyaçlar ve kaçınılmaz gecikmeler için toplam izin (ISO 9001 / ILO yönergeleri).

inputs.label: Frequency per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: How many times the observed element occurs per complete work cycle (e.g., 2 inspections per assembly).

businessContext_i18n.en: How many times the observed element occurs per complete work cycle (e.g., 2 inspections per assembly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gözlemlenen elemanın tam bir iş çevriminde kaç kez gerçekleştiği (örneğin, montaj başına 2 muayene).

inputs.label: Work Measurement Method
inputs.businessContext: The technique used to obtain the observed time; affects confidence and adjustment factors.

businessContext_i18n.en: The technique used to obtain the observed time; affects confidence and adjustment factors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gözlemlenen süreyi elde etmek için kullanılan teknik; güven ve düzeltme faktörlerini etkiler.

inputs.label: Include Learning Curve Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a learning curve factor (80% slope) for new or changed processes.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a learning curve factor (80% slope) for new or changed processes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, yeni veya değiştirilmiş süreçler için bir öğrenme eğrisi faktörü (%80 eğim) uygular.

rules.message: Observed time must be greater than 0 seconds.
Performance rating must be between 50% and 150%.
Allowance percentage must be between 0% and 50%.
Frequency per cycle must be positive.
Learning curve adjustment is not recommended with Work Sampling method due to high variability.

thresholds.message: Observed time exceeds typical single-element threshold; consider breaking down the element.
High performance rating may indicate rating bias; verify with video analysis.
Allowance above 20% may indicate excessive non-value-added time; review work conditions.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
